metric_definition.name: drift_issue_auto_create_count
metric_definition.measured_by: gh issue list --label drift-detection --created >=$(date -d '3 months ago')

gate_status_history.reason: 초기 도입 — 첫 3 month rolling window 측정 시작

sunset_criteria.promotion_path: warming → ready (after 3 months 0 drift) → sunset (after 6 months 0 drift + ArchitectPL ratification)
